headline: NextEra Energy Targets Data Center Growth With Gas Heavy Capacity Expansion
summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) outlined plans to develop 15 to 30 gigawatts of new generation capacity by 2035. The buildout is aimed at serving rising power needs from U.S. data centers tied to AI and broader digital adoption. The company expects a large portion of this expansion to come from new natural gas projects, adding to its existing portfolio. For you as an investor, the key point is that a company often viewed mainly as a regulated utility is leaning further into the power needs of...
